falsification_attempt: Checked whether the missing BlockVerifier trait-object API meant verifier behavior was unported. The v2.2 crate instead exposes verify_short_async_block_with_simulators and related helpers, and nodebuilder supplies the EVM replay/predicate hooks through its post-execution validator.
missed_risks: Consumers that still require the old BlockVerifierTrait API would need migration; current v2.2 nodebuilder uses the function API.
notes: This resolves the atom as an intentional API-shape refactor, not a missing verifier implementation.
